title: The Sound of Raindrums
description: noteblocks act as raindrums when its raining and play the sound corrosponding to the block underneath
body:
# 💧The Sound of Raindrums💧

Sound of Raindrums add the function for noteblocks to produce sounds when raining. Noteblocks will play random sounds corrosponding to the block underneath, like vanilla minecraft. except now it happens randomly when its raining.

every sound is added, even if it makes no sense:

- Gold Block → Bell
- Clay → Flute
- Packed Ice → Chime
- Bone Block → Xylophone
- Iron Block → Iron Xylophone
- Soul Sand → Cow Bell
- Pumpkin → Didgeridoo
- Emerald Block → Bit
- Hay Bale → Banjo
- Glowstone → Pling
- Wood Planks/Logs → Bass
- Sand → Snare
- Glass → Hat
- Wool → Guitar
- Stone/Cobblestone → Basedrum
- Air/Unknown → Harp (default)

## Installation:

Currently in forge 1.20/1/2/4, soon more ports will come.
make sure forge 1.20/1/2/4 is installed, then add it to the mods folder, then start minecraft, then start the rain, stand close to the noteblock. Then listen...

This mod is for client side, only the player needs it.

### Side Note
If you like my work you can buy me a cookie, jellybean, or chocolate milk
This mod is more a test, if it gets enough attention i will expand on it. There are some thing i will fix about it tho.
